productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Lo Punk Black Yellow Shoe
description: Inspired by pop and graffitti art, the Chuck Killer range of puma shoes are all about having fun with colour. Summery in their approach, they are vibrant and energetic, adding a zing to all your casual outfits. This pair of puma shoes are designed for the bold and the beautiful. Upper Canvas upper with bold punk graphics and puma logo Synthetic twill tape laces looped around metallic eyelets Additonal pair of laces in different colour for a new look Synthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefoot Stitch detailing of form stripes on the sides Midsole Comfort insole with canvas tongue with graphics to ensure a snug, comfortable Fit Textile lining for added comfort Outsole Made of high traction gum rubber Rubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall trip Textured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum grip Reinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritation
